ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the rental */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a holiday (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a working day (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weather" INTEGER /* Weather condition (1: clear, 2: mist, 3: light snow, 4: heavy rain) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Feeling temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total number of users */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rental */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the rental */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the rental */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the rental */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the rental */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second of the rental */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the rental occurred in */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the rental */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rental */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied, if any */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the rental data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_workingday FOREIGN KEY ("workingday") REFERENCES working_days ("workingday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_weather FOREIGN KEY ("weather") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the city */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the city */,
  "average_ridership" INTEGER /* Average number of daily riders in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation (rain or snow) in mm */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the season */,
  "average_humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_days" (
  "workingday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working day */,
  "workingday_name" TEXT /* Name of the working day */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the working day */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workingday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., casual, registered, admin) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up */,
  "last_rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last rental */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals made by the user */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., available, in repair) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the bike operates in */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  "service_interval" INTEGER /* Interval in days between services */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level (for electric bikes) */,
  "gps_location" TEXT /* GPS location of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_bikes" (
  "rental_bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike rental */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental transaction */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "rental_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rental */,
  "rental_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rental */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "start_location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the start location */,
  "start_location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the start location */,
  "end_location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the end location */,
  "end_location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the end location */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken during the rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_bikes_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_bikes_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_logs" (
  "weather_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather log */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather log */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Feeling temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation (rain or snow) in mm */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the platform was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (device and browser information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the technician works in */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)
